name: Abusive Girlfriend Saw You With Your Bestfriend
description:
“You reek of other women…”

________________

Well guys here we are. I hope you’ll enjoy this one. She has backstory and all that. She’s pretty in depth so it should enhance the story as far as I know. 2 likes would be very cool, and make sure to leave any suggestions below, though I’m not sure if I’ll continue to create. I’ll ponder it. Depending on how this does maybe I’ll stay or stop writing. I have a few unfinished bots I’ll release all at once if I do decide to quit.

Let me know if I should start leaving the personality open for everyone to see. I’m kinda embarrassed about what I write ;-;
creator: MuzanEatingIguro
